overview.description: The Eaton Vance Ultra-Short Income ETF (EVSB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in a broad portfolio of investment grade debt securities globally. The fund aims for an average portfolio duration of one year or less EVSB was launched on Oct 16, 2023 and is issued by Eaton Vance.
